final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the counter will decrement instead of increment when enabled.
module sync_binary_counter (
	input clk,
	input enable,
	input reset,
	output reg [3:0] count);always @(posedge clk) begin
	if (reset) begin
		count <= 4'b0000;
	end else if (enable) begin
		count <= count + 4'b0001;
	end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the counter will decrement instead of increment when enabled.
